title: assignment_created/v1 payload
description: Payload for assignment_changed events with shape_ref assignment_created/v1. Binds an actor to a scope with a role.

role.description: Opaque role label. Deployer vocabulary validated in Phase 3.

geographic.description: Single location UUID. Non-contiguous areas require separate assignments.

subject_list.description: Explicit list of subject UUIDs. Null means no subject-list restriction.

activity.description: List of permitted activity_ref values. Null means no activity restriction.

scope.description: Scope dimensions. All non-null dimensions must pass (AND). OR across assignments.

valid_to.description: When the assignment expires. Null means indefinite (active until explicitly ended).
